column.name: is_auto_generated
column.comment: 1 if auto-created by entity delete; 0 if admin-curated

table.name: panth_seo_related
table.comment: Panth SEO related / internal linking suggestions

column.name: source_value
column.comment: Source Value (attribute code, static text, or template token)

column.name: default_value
column.comment: Default Value if Source is Empty

table.name: panth_seo_ai_prompt
table.comment: AI Prompt Templates for Meta Generation

table.name: panth_seo_ai_knowledge
table.comment: AI Knowledge Base for Content Generation Context

column.name: category
column.comment: Category: pagebuilder, seo, ecommerce, accessibility, html_patterns
